description_long: This is a freestanding outdoor canopy with a pitched, dark green metal roof supported by a wooden frame. The structure features four vertical wooden posts, with crossbeams providing additional stability and support. One side of the canopy is adorned with climbing greenery, adding a natural decorative element, while a black hanging birdcage is suspended from the central crossbeam. The roof panels are corrugated, giving the canopy a robust and weather-resistant appearance. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for providing shelter in parks, gardens, or urban public spaces.
description: A pitched-roof canopy with a dark green metal top, wooden frame, climbing greenery, and a hanging birdcage.
description_view_0: The canopy is seen at an angle, showing the pitched roof, wooden frame, climbing greenery on the left, and a hanging birdcage in the center.
description_view_1: A direct side view of the canopy, highlighting the solid dark green roof and the wooden frame, with minimal visibility of the greenery or birdcage.
description_view_2: A frontal view displaying the pitched roof, wooden frame, and partial visibility of the climbing greenery on the right side.
description_view_3: A side view with the climbing greenery prominently visible on the right, and the roof and frame structure clearly outlined.
attribute_support_structure_design: The canopy is supported by four vertical wooden posts connected by horizontal crossbeams, forming a rectangular frame. The pitched roof is mounted atop the frame, and additional diagonal braces provide stability. Climbing plants are integrated into one side, enhancing both aesthetics and support.
attribute_edge_detailing: The roof edges are straight and reinforced, with exposed metal ridges and a visible wooden frame beneath. No decorative trim or scalloping is present.
